result.stdout:
Description:
  Kodify CLI - A command-line interface for the Kodify tools.

Usage:
  Kodify.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  changelog       Generates a changelog for the project
  readme          Generates a README.md file for the project
  githubactions   Generate GitHub Actions workflow
  gitlabci        Generate GitLab CI pipeline
  azuredevops     Generate Azure DevOps pipeline
  terraform       Generate Terraform infrastructure code
  cloudformation  Generate AWS CloudFormation template
  puml            Generate PlantUML class diagrams for the project

commands.payload:
Description:
  Kodify CLI - A command-line interface for the Kodify tools.

Usage:
  Kodify.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  changelog       Generates a changelog for the project
  readme          Generates a README.md file for the project
  githubactions   Generate GitHub Actions workflow
  gitlabci        Generate GitLab CI pipeline
  azuredevops     Generate Azure DevOps pipeline
  terraform       Generate Terraform infrastructure code
  cloudformation  Generate AWS CloudFormation template
  puml            Generate PlantUML class diagrams for the project

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate Azure DevOps pipeline

Usage:
  Kodify.CLI azuredevops [options]

Options:
  --path <path>   The path to the project or solution
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates a changelog for the project

Usage:
  Kodify.CLI changelog [options]

Options:
  --path <path>        The path to the project or solution
  --api-key <api-key>  The API key for AI service integration. If not provided, generates changelog without AI.
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate PlantUML class diagrams for the project

Usage:
  Kodify.CLI puml [options]

Options:
  --output <output>  The output directory path for the generated PUML files. Defaults to './diagrams' if not specified.
  --path <path>      The path to the project or solution to analyze. Defaults to current directory if not specified.
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate PlantUML class diagrams for the project

Usage:
  Kodify.CLI puml [options]

Options:
  --output <output>  The output directory path for the generated PUML files. Defaults to './diagrams' if not specified.
  --path <path>      The path to the project or solution to analyze. Defaults to current directory if not specified.
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates a README.md file for the project

Usage:
  Kodify.CLI readme [options]

Options:
  --path <path>          The path to the project or solution
  --name <name>          The name of the project
  --summary <summary>    A brief summary of the project
  --usage <usage>        Usage instructions for the project
  --api-key <api-key>    The API key for AI service integration. If not provided, generates basic README without AI.
  --template <template>  Path to a custom README template file
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

  --template <template>  Path to a custom README template file
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
